# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is the Next.js frontend for the Micha Stocks Course fan site. It displays lessons, transcripts, and course content in an interactive, infographic-style format.

## Repository Structure
- `src/app/` — Next.js App Router pages and layouts (includes `lesson/[id]/` and `reports/[date]/[time]/`)
- `src/components/` — Reusable React components
- `src/data/` — Auto-generated data files (do not edit manually)
- `src/lib/` — Server-side utility modules (e.g. `reports.ts` reads report files from the pipeline repo)
- `public/` — Static assets

## Tech Stack
- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Linting:** ESLint

## Rules
- **Always use TypeScript** — no plain `.js` files in `src/`.
- Use **PascalCase** for component filenames and exports (e.g., `ConceptCard.tsx`).
- Style with **Tailwind CSS utility classes** — avoid inline styles or separate CSS files unless absolutely necessary.
- Keep components in `src/components/`. Page-level code belongs in `src/app/`.
- `src/data/course.json` is auto-generated by the pipeline — never edit it manually.
- `src/data/sections.json` is auto-generated by the pipeline — never edit it manually.
- `src/data/sections.ts` imports from `sections.json` and exports `SECTIONS`, `LESSON_SECTION`, `SECTION_COLORS`, and helper functions — it is the runtime interface for section data.
- Follow the **App Router** conventions (file-based routing, `layout.tsx`, `page.tsx`).
- Run ESLint before committing: `npm run lint`.

## Dev Commands
```bash
npm install       # Install dependencies
npm run dev       # Start dev server (http://localhost:3000)
npm run build     # Build for production
npm start         # Serve the production build
npm run lint      # Run ESLint
```

## Key Dependencies
- `framer-motion` — animations
- `lucide-react` — icons
- `react-markdown` — markdown rendering (used in `InlineMarkdown.tsx`)
- `recharts` — charts
- `clsx` + `tailwind-merge` — conditional class utilities

## Reports
- Market insight reports are generated by `pipeline/insights/market_insights.py` in the `micha-stocks-fan` repo
- Reports live at `content/reports/YYYY-MM-DD/HH-MM/report.md` in the pipeline repo
- `src/lib/reports.ts` reads those files at build/request time — do not duplicate report data in `src/data/`
- Report content is in **Hebrew** and renders RTL (`dir="rtl" lang="he"`)
- `REPORTS_DIR` env var overrides the default sibling-repo path

## Installed Skills
| Skill | When to Use |
|---|---|
| `.github/skills/find-skills/` | Discover other skills from the open ecosystem |
| `.github/skills/recharts/` | Building data visualisations with Recharts |
| `.github/skills/tailwind-css/` | Tailwind CSS patterns and utilities |
| `.github/skills/tailwind-design-system/` | Design tokens, component variants, Tailwind v4 `@theme` |

## Data Types
- `Lesson.takeaways` is `{ text: string; level: number }[]` — **not** `string[]`
- `Lesson.concepts` is `{ title: string; body: string; timestamp?: number }[]`
- `SectionDef` is `{ id: string; label: string; color: string }` (exported from `sections.ts`)

## Git
- **Never run `git push` unless the user explicitly asks.** Commit freely, but always wait for a "push" instruction before pushing to remote.
